tool.name: EnzyWizard Substrate
tool.description: Process small-molecule substrates from names or SMILES strings

param.name: substrate_names
param.label: Substrate names or SMILES
param.help: Input substrate names or SMILES strings separated by ';'.

param.name: max_synonyms
param.label: Maximum synonyms
param.help: Maximum number of substrate synonyms retried when fetching SMILES from a substrate name. Default: 20

param.name: fp_radius
param.label: Fingerprint radius
param.help: Radius used for Morgan fingerprint encoding. Default: 2

param.name: n_bits
param.label: Fingerprint bits
param.help: Bit size of the Morgan fingerprint encoding vector. Default: 512

param.name: num_confs
param.label: Number of conformers
param.help: Maximum number of molecular structures to generate for each substrate. Default: 5

param.name: prune_rms
param.label: Prune RMS
param.help: RMS threshold used to prune highly similar conformers. Default: 0.5

tool.help:
**EnzyWizard-Substrate**
Processes small-molecule substrates from user-provided substrate names or SMILES strings. Retrieves substrate information through ChEBI and PubChem APIs, generates 3D conformations, and outputs SDF files.
**Inputs** - Substrate names or SMILES strings separated by ';'.
**Outputs** - JSON report with substrate information and descriptors. - SDF files for each substrate conformation.
For more information, see the `enzywizard-substrate` documentation: https://github.com/bioinfbrad/enzywizard-substrate
